title: JUMP-2326 ●Tomo no paradise Pies premenstrual girls! ! Elementary Raw Happening School Trip
overview: For the students, the school excursion event is also a once-a-year big event for the teachers to attack the students they were aiming for. In the middle of a school trip away from her parents' home, memories too unfortunate to be called sex education for premenstrual girls are engraved. The PTA and parents probably have no way of knowing about the stupidity of the teachers.
